name: Feedly AI-Powered News and Intelligence API
what_it_does: AI-powered news and market intelligence platform with REST API — enabling users and teams to follow RSS feeds, curate topics of interest, and use Leo AI to filter out noise, track competitors, monitor industry trends, extract named entities, and surface must-read content, with enterprise features for team intelligence boards and integrations with Slack, Microsoft Teams, and productivity tools.
use_cases: Aggregating and querying articles from followed RSS feeds via Feedly API for content pipeline
Using Feedly Leo AI topic tracking to surface relevant articles via API for intelligence automation
Integrating Feedly article stream with Slack or Teams via API for team news digests
Building custom news monitoring dashboards by pulling Feedly article data via API
Tracking competitor mentions and industry events via Feedly AI-powered topic streams via API
not_for: Personal bookmark management (use Raindrop.io or Pocket for bookmark-focused use)
Deep content research with full-text annotation (use Readwise Reader for annotation workflows)
Social media monitoring beyond news (use Brandwatch or Mention for social listening)
best_when: A professional or team needs structured, AI-filtered news monitoring across industry publications and competitor channels — replacing manual news curation with intelligent topic tracking and named entity extraction.
avoid_when: You need social media monitoring, full-text search across saved articles, personal bookmark management, or have no RSS-indexed content sources.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow for user access. Developer access token for personal integrations. Bearer token auth. User-scoped access. Webhook for new article and feed change events (Enterprise feature). REST API v3 for stream, entry, and subscription management. Leo AI API for topic tracking and entity extraction (Pro/Teams features). SCIM provisioning for Enterprise. Feedly for Teams has additional admin API endpoints.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: up to 100 sources, limited Leo AI features
pricing.paid_tiers: Pro $8/month; Pro+ $18/month (Leo AI full access); Teams $18/user/month; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: San Francisco company. Founded 2008. Raised $16M Series B (2013). Backed by North Bridge Venture Partners. 15M+ users globally. Pioneer in RSS reader market (launched after Google Reader shutdown in 2013). Leo AI is the key differentiator — trained on 100M+ articles for topic classification and entity extraction. Enterprise intelligence boards for team knowledge sharing. Used by Spotify, Delta Air Lines, IBM for market intelligence. Enterprise webhooks and SCIM available. Strong developer community.

performance.rate_limits: 250 API calls per day (free); higher limits on paid tiers

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API v3 for news stream and subscription management. OAuth2 auth with scopes. Good developer documentation with stream query examples. Webhook for feed events (Enterprise). Leo AI topic API for intelligence automation. Rate limit 250/day on free is restrictive — paid plans have higher limits. Leo AI features require Pro+ or Teams plan.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Entry reads fully idempotent. Stream queries idempotent by feed ID + pagination. Subscription reads idempotent. Mark-as-read operations idempotent by entry ID.
known_agent_gotchas: Daily rate limit (250/day free) is restrictive — agent polling must be conservative
Leo AI features (topic tracking, entity extraction) require Pro+ or Teams plan
Webhooks (for real-time article events) are Enterprise-only — polling required on lower tiers
Article full text may be truncated by RSS publisher — Feedly does not scrape full text
GDPR compliance with US data residency — EU Privacy Shield/adequacy decision applies

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and SOC2 compliant. US data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. Well-established company with 15+ years operating. Reading habits and topic interests are privacy-sensitive — protect OAuth tokens carefully. Enterprise SCIM and SSO for team access management. Webhook HMAC verification available for Enterprise. Leo AI processes article content — review data handling for sensitive intelligence workflows.
